title: Latest F1 News
description: Don't miss a Formula 1 moment – with the latest news, videos, standings and results. Go behind the scenes and get analysis straight from the paddock.

items.title: F1 Fantasy tips to take on Antonelli in Miami and Canada
items.content: Upcoming Sprint weekends in Miami and Montreal present a strategic double header for F1 Fantasy managers. With changeable weather conditions proving to be a factor in recent years at these tracks, who can deliver the points?
items.contentSnippet: Upcoming Sprint weekends in Miami and Montreal present a strategic double header for F1 Fantasy managers. With changeable weather conditions proving to be a factor in recent years at these tracks, who can deliver the points?
items.creator: Formula 1
items.summary: 即将在迈阿密和蒙特利尔举行的F1分站赛为幻想赛事经理带来战略双重挑战。由于这些赛道近年来的天气多变，谁能获得积分成为关键。

items.title: Super Friday entertainment at Dutch Grand Prix announced
items.content: Afrojack, Flemming, Kraantje Pappie, Snelle and Snollebollekes have been announced for Super Friday at the 2026 Dutch Grand Prix in Zandvoort.
items.contentSnippet: Afrojack, Flemming, Kraantje Pappie, Snelle and Snollebollekes have been announced for Super Friday at the 2026 Dutch Grand Prix in Zandvoort.
items.creator: Formula 1
items.summary: 2026年荷兰大奖赛Super Friday娱乐活动已公布，将邀请Afrojack、Flemming、Kraantje Pappie、Snelle和Snollebollekes等艺人表演。

items.title: Lindblad on his fast start to life in F1
items.content: Racing Bulls rookie Arvid Lindblad joins *Beyond The Grid* to discuss his start to life in F1 and much more.
items.contentSnippet: Racing Bulls rookie Arvid Lindblad joins *Beyond The Grid* to discuss his start to life in F1 and much more.
items.creator: Formula 1
items.summary: 阿维德·林德布拉德（Arvid Lindblad）作为雷诺赛车的F1新秀，在节目《Beyond The Grid》中分享了他在F1的初期经历。他讨论了作为F1的起步阶段，并涉及更多相关话题。

items.title: Herta on his FP1 opportunities and the ‘biggest goal’
items.content: Colton Herta is set to drive in Barcelona for Cadillac, with the American keen to show the team what he can do.

items.title: The state of play at Mercedes
items.content: Mercedes are the team to beat in 2026 so far, but will Kimi Antonelli and George Russell manage to stay ahead of the chasing pack?

items.title: What tyres will the teams and drivers have for Miami?
items.content: After their spring break, the teams and drivers are heading to Miami for the fourth round of the season. But which tyres have Pirelli chosen for the Sprint weekend in the States?
